recommendations.title: Rupture
recommendations.overview: A single mom tries to break free from a mysterious organization that has abducted her.

recommendations.title: Dìdi (弟弟)
recommendations.overview: In 2008, during the last month of summer before high school begins, an impressionable 13-year-old Taiwanese American boy learns what his family can't teach him: how to skate, how to flirt, and how to love your mom.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: Mercy
recommendations.overview: A single mom and her two boys help take care of their grandmother with mystical powers.

recommendations.title: Hell Night
recommendations.overview: As an initiation rite into Alpha Sigma Rho fraternity, four pledges must spend a night in Garth Manor, twelve years to the day after the previous resident murdered his entire family.

recommendations.title: Kidulthood
recommendations.overview: A day in the life of a group of troubled 15-year-olds growing up in west London.

recommendations.title: The Elixir
recommendations.overview: An elixir unleashes the undead in a village. A family at odds with one another must unite and fight to survive as their hometown collapses.

recommendations.title: Cranston Academy: Monster Zone
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Horror
recommendations.overview: An intelligent 15-year-old high school student is unexpectedly transferred to a boarding school where he opens a portal of monsters from another dimension.

recommendations.title: Totally Killer
recommendations.overview: When the infamous "Sweet Sixteen Killer" returns 35 years after his first murder spree to claim another victim, 17-year-old Jamie accidentally travels back in time to 1987, determined to stop the killer before he can start.

recommendations.title: The Last Survivors
recommendations.overview: In the near future, society collapses and water becomes scarce. When a greedy water baron starts violently clearing out survivors, Kendal, a 17-year-old teenager, fights the baron's henchman to keep a well open.
